title: Better Structure Loot
description: Makes the Loot Table of All Structures More Acurate to their Enviroment and Purpose
body:
## tweaks some loot tables to have more variety of items.

**village:**
- spyglass in cartographer chest
- shears in shepard chest
- shovel & some potery sherds in mason
- fishing rod in fisherman chest
- bow and arrows in fletcher chest
- sword and axe in weaponsmith chest
- picaxe in toolsmith

## news on V2

**bastions:**
- quartz
- nether wart
- glistering melon
- fire charges
- wither skulls (super rare, really)
- respawn anchor

**pillager outpost:**
- resin clump
- ominous bottle

**shipwrek:**
- fishing rod
- ink sac
- nautilus shell


### not so relevant
-  nether fortress 
-  igloo 
-  ancient city
-  buried treasure
